name: symfony
description: Symfony Console CLI provides commands for creating projects, managing servers, generating code, handling database migrations, clearing caches, debugging routes, and more within the Symfony PHP framework.

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.description: Create a new Symfony project in a specified directory

options.name: --version
options.description: Symfony version to install (e.g. 7.0, lts, stable, next)

subcommands.name: server:start
subcommands.description: Start the local Symfony development web server in the background

options.name: --no-tls
options.description: Disable TLS and use plain HTTP

options.name: --allow-http
options.description: Allow HTTP connections even when TLS is available

subcommands.name: server:stop
subcommands.description: Stop the local Symfony development web server

subcommands.name: make:controller
subcommands.description: Create a new controller class with optional route annotations

options.name: --invokable
options.description: Create an invokable controller with __invoke method

subcommands.name: make:entity
subcommands.description: Create or update a Doctrine entity class with properties and repository

options.name: --regenerate
options.description: Regenerate an existing entity class based on annotations

options.name: --with-uuid
options.description: Use UUID as the entity identifier

subcommands.name: make:form
subcommands.description: Create a new form class, optionally bound to an entity

subcommands.name: make:migration
subcommands.description: Generate a new database migration by comparing current mapping to database schema

subcommands.name: make:command
subcommands.description: Create a new Symfony console command class

subcommands.name: make:subscriber
subcommands.description: Create a new event subscriber class

subcommands.name: make:test
subcommands.description: Create a new test class (unit, functional, or integration)

options.name: --type
options.description: Type of test: Unit, Functional, or Integration

subcommands.name: make:voter
subcommands.description: Create a new security voter class

subcommands.name: make:fixture
subcommands.description: Create a new data fixture class for populating the database with sample data

subcommands.name: doctrine:migrations:migrate
subcommands.description: Execute database migrations up to the latest available version

args.name: version
args.description: Target version to migrate to (default: latest)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Execute migration as a dry run without applying changes

options.name: --no-interaction
options.description: Do not ask any interactive question

options.name: --allow-no-migration
options.description: Do not throw an exception when no migration is available

subcommands.name: doctrine:schema:update
subcommands.description: Execute or dump SQL to update the database schema to match current mapping information

options.name: --force
options.description: Execute schema updates directly on the database

options.name: --dump-sql
options.description: Display the SQL statements without executing them

options.name: --complete
options.description: Drop tables and columns not defined in mapping

options.name: --em
options.description: Name of the entity manager to use

subcommands.name: doctrine:schema:validate
subcommands.description: Validate the Doctrine mapping files and check sync with the database schema

subcommands.name: doctrine:fixtures:load
subcommands.description: Load data fixtures into the database

options.name: --append
options.description: Append data to existing data, instead of purging

options.name: --group
options.description: Only load fixtures from specific group(s)

options.name: --purge-with-truncate
options.description: Use TRUNCATE to purge data instead of DELETE

options.name: --em
options.description: Name of the entity manager to use

subcommands.name: cache:clear
subcommands.description: Clear the Symfony application cache

options.name: --no-warmup
options.description: Do not warm up the cache after clearing

options.name: --env
options.description: The environment to clear cache for

subcommands.name: cache:warmup
subcommands.description: Warm up an empty cache directory

options.name: --env
options.description: The environment to warm up cache for

subcommands.name: debug:router
subcommands.description: Display all configured routes in the application

args.name: name
args.description: A route name to show details for

options.name: --show-controllers
options.description: Show controller action for each route

subcommands.name: debug:container
subcommands.description: Display current services for an application

args.name: name
args.description: A service name or search pattern

options.name: --tag
options.description: Show services with a specific tag

options.name: --tags
options.description: Display tagged services for an application

subcommands.name: debug:autowiring
subcommands.description: List all autowirable types and their aliases

options.name: --all
options.description: Show also services that are not aliased

subcommands.name: debug:config
subcommands.description: Dump the current configuration for an extension

subcommands.name: assets:install
subcommands.description: Install bundle web assets under the public directory

subcommands.name: messenger:consume
subcommands.description: Consume messages from one or more transports

args.name: receivers
args.description: Name(s) of the transport(s) to consume

options.name: --limit
options.description: Limit the number of received messages

options.name: --sleep
options.description: Seconds to sleep when no messages (default: 1)

options.name: --bus
options.description: Name of the message bus to use

options.name: --no-reset
options.description: Do not reset services after each message

subcommands.name: security:hash-password
subcommands.description: Hash a user password using the configured password hasher

options.name: --user-class
options.description: Security user class to use for hashing

subcommands.name: lint:yaml
subcommands.description: Lint YAML files for syntax errors

subcommands.name: lint:container
subcommands.description: Check that arguments injected into services match their type declarations

subcommands.name: lint:twig
subcommands.description: Lint Twig templates for syntax errors

globalOptions.name: --no-interaction
globalOptions.description: Do not ask any interactive question

globalOptions.name: --format
globalOptions.description: Output format where applicable (txt, json, xml)

globalOptions.name: --help
globalOptions.description: Display help for the given command

examples: php bin/console make:migration && php bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate
php bin/console lint:yaml config/ && php bin/console lint:twig templates/

detectors.name: symfony_lock_exists
detectors.description: Detect symfony.lock file indicating a Symfony project

detectors.name: bundles_php_exists
detectors.description: Detect config/bundles.php for Symfony bundle registration

detectors.name: symfony_version
detectors.description: Detect installed Symfony version from composer.lock

detectors.name: symfony_bin_console
detectors.description: Check if Symfony console is available
